recommended_workflow: Save this file in your repo root as securefight-defense-plan.json.
Give the bundle to your implementation agent (for example Claude) to apply selected changes.
Review generated git diff quickly, run tests, then push to your repository.

rounds.mitigation: Layered validation, authorization checks, and secure defaults reduce exploitability for this vector.
rounds.defender_reasoning: Defender evaluated vector=API Key Leakage, severity=medium, and current hp=100 to choose a blocked outcome. Usual-suspect checks: input validation, authN/authZ, secrets handling, and security logging coverage.
rounds.defense_strategy: Prioritize api: Layered validation, authorization checks, and secure defaults reduce exploitability for this vector. Then apply code change 'Add layered controls for API Key Leakage'.

changes.title: Add layered controls for API Key Leakage
changes.patch:
+ # Add deny-by-default authorization check
+ # Add allowlist validation for untrusted input
+ # Add request throttling for high-risk routes

rounds.defense_strategy: Prioritize Object access endpoint: Enforce ownership checks on every object access, not just at route level. Then apply code change 'Verify resource ownership per request'.

changes.title: Verify resource ownership per request
changes.patch:
+ if invoice.account_id != current_user.account_id:
